subject: eng_b_hl
syllabus: English B (first assessment 2020), HL scope for May 2027
note: Language subjects use skill KPs plus thematic-context KPs. All new KPs start covered=false until school coverage is confirmed.

kps.name: Identify purpose, audience, register and text type
Infer meaning, attitude, tone and implied viewpoint
Select evidence and distinguish main ideas from detail
Recognize gist, context and speaker relationship
Extract precise factual details and sequence
Infer intention, attitude and unstated meaning
Fulfil task, purpose and required content
Choose and sustain appropriate text type, register and conventions
Organize ideas coherently with effective paragraphing and cohesion
Grammar accuracy and varied sentence structures
Range, precision and idiomatic use of vocabulary
Spelling, punctuation and clarity of expression
Present a focused interpretation of the literary extract
Support ideas with relevant reference to the work
Respond spontaneously and extend answers in discussion
Pronunciation, intonation and comprehensibility
Fluency, pacing and repair strategies
Interactive listening, turn-taking and elaboration
Character, setting, conflict and theme
Narrative voice, structure and stylistic choices
Context, perspective and authorial purpose
Identities
Experiences
Human ingenuity
Social organization
Sharing the planet
